summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CI/CD pipeline and vitest test infrastructure for Next.js app with Cloudflare Pages deployment

configuration_issues.issue: Type errors in app/waitlist/page.tsx and tests/setup.ts NODE_ENV assignment
configuration_issues.impact: npm run typecheck fails but doesn't affect vitest tests

configuration_issues.issue: Missing eslint.config.js file - ESLint v10 requires new config format
configuration_issues.impact: npm run lint fails in CI pipeline

passed_tests: CI/CD workflow YAML structure is valid with 4 jobs (lint-and-typecheck, test, build, deploy)
Deploy job correctly configured to run only on push to main branch
vitest.config.ts has correct configuration (@vitejs/plugin-react, node env, v8 coverage)
tests/setup.ts properly mocks env vars, KV namespace, and fetch
package.json contains all 6 required scripts (test, test:watch, test:coverage, typecheck, lint, build:cf)
PR template exists with proper checklist items
memory-sanitizer tests: injection stripping, text preservation, 3000 char truncation, empty string handling
token-counter tests: estimateTokens, truncateToTokenLimit (min 4 messages, preserves last), estimateRequestTokens overhead
response-cache tests: buildCacheKey determinism/normalization, isCacheable logic
model-router tests: selectGeminiModel routing logic, estimateRequestCost > 0
health API tests: 200 ok, 207 degraded (KV error), 207 degraded (missing env), 503 down
Test coverage report generates successfully with v8 provider
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix ESLint configuration by migrating to eslint.config.js format (ESLint v10 requirement) and resolve TypeScript errors in app/waitlist/page.tsx and tests/setup.ts NODE_ENV assignment
